query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.nameEn,
  COUNT(m.id) as mapping_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT plo.id) as plo_count
FROM programs p
LEFT JOIN plos plo ON p.id = plo.programId
LEFT JOIN mappings m ON plo.id = m.ploId
GROUP BY p.id, p.nameEn
HAVING mapping_count > 50
ORDER BY mapping_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

GROUP BY p.id, p.nameEn
HAVING mapping_count > 50
